label: Sidenav
summary: The left nav list: pixel bullets, section headers, and visited links proudly purple.
era: The left-hand nav column of every frameset site: star bullets, bold section caps, links purple from visiting.

classes.name: rs-sidenav
classes.role: the nav list; visited-link purple lives here

a11y: A <nav> landmark with an aria-label wrapping real lists; the bullets are decoration, and links keep their visited state on purpose.
